refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable real-time monitoring and adjustment of operational parameters to achieve the customer-defined productivity target measured in m³/h or ton/h.
refined_fr.rationale: Achieving the productivity target requires breaking down the high-level productivity KPI into actionable sub-functions that can be monitored and controlled in real time.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify through operational data logs and performance reports that the system maintains or exceeds the productivity target during representative operations.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h).
FR2: Adjust operational parameters to optimize productivity.
FR3: Report productivity status to stakeholders.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement sensor and telemetry data acquisition for productivity metrics.
DP2: Develop adaptive control algorithms to adjust operational parameters.
DP3: Create a reporting interface for productivity status.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement sensor and telemetry data acquisition for productivity metrics.

coupling_check.notes: The selected DP focuses on data acquisition, which is logically separable from control and reporting functions, minimizing coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable sensor data and telemetry infrastructure.
Risk of data latency impacting real-time adjustments.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integration with control algorithms in subsequent decomposition levels to ensure closed-loop productivity optimization.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical sensors and telemetry systems embedded in the vehicle to capture productivity metrics.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends real-time productivity data via Telemetry interface to NGHE Solution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between Vehicle and Teleoperation or Safety Services modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High-level coordination but not direct sensor data acquisition.
Primary containment of sensor and telemetry hardware; minimal diffusion.
Receives telemetry data but does not contain sensors.
No involvement in productivity data acquisition.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Sensor data acquisition and telemetry are best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize interface complexity and latency.
containment_risks: Potential hardware failure in Vehicle sensors impacting productivity monitoring.
Limited flexibility if telemetry protocols change requiring Vehicle module updates.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate telemetry interface robustness and consider fallback mechanisms in Vehicle module.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR by enabling real-time productivity data acquisition.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as sensor acquisition is localized in Vehicle module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly support Vehicle as the appropriate IM boundary.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing sensor data accuracy and telemetry transmission during operations.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of sensor acquisition to Vehicle module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Plan next decomposition level to address control and reporting functions.
Assess telemetry interface performance under network load.

decision.justification: While the initial DP and IM assignment for sensor data acquisition is sound, the FR refinement should be expanded to include control and reporting sub-functions to fully address productivity KPI.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h).
FR2: Adjust operational parameters to optimize productivity.
FR3: Report productivity status to stakeholders.

revise.why: To explicitly capture all necessary sub-functions for achieving the productivity KPI before further DP and IM assignments.

assumptions: Reliable sensor and telemetry infrastructure exists within Vehicle.
Telemetry interface supports required data rates.
evidence_needed: Telemetry performance metrics under representative operational conditions.
Sensor accuracy and reliability test results.
